description: The Noto Peninsula, Japan earthquake (2024-01-01, M7.5) currently has only standard short-period magnitudes (mb) in the database, which typically saturate for large events. Re-process this event to calculate broadband body-wave (mB) and W-phase (Mwp) magnitudes. Use the event data from /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/events/noto_earthquake.scml, the SDS archive at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive, and the inventory from the database (mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp). Ensure both mB and Mwp magnitudes are successfully calculated and save the final reprocessed event to ~/Documents/noto_reprocessed.scml.
